trade.summary: Bilateral trade collapsed following Russia's invasion of Ukraine in February 2022 and the subsequent EU sanctions regime. Pre-war trade exceeded 20 billion EUR. French companies largely exited Russia, and Russian energy exports to France effectively ceased. Residual trade covers limited humanitarian and exempt categories.
disputes: France party to EU sanctions regime on Russia
frozen assets of Russian oligarchs in France

diplomatic.summary: France-Russia relations are at their lowest point since the Cold War. France has strongly supported Ukraine militarily and diplomatically. Macron's early attempts at dialogue with Putin failed. France expelled Russian diplomats, froze oligarch assets, and leads European diplomatic isolation of Russia. Russia designated France an 'unfriendly country.' Macron has publicly discussed possibility of European troop deployments to Ukraine.
recent_incidents: Russian cyber attacks on French government systems
Russian FSB espionage arrests in France (2023-2024)

military.summary: France and Russia are effectively in a state of proxy conflict through Ukraine. France provides Ukraine with substantial military aid including Caesar artillery, armored vehicles, air defence systems, and training. Russia has threatened retaliation against French arms supplies. All bilateral military cooperation suspended.
incidents: Russian targeting of French-supplied weapons systems in Ukraine
Russian hybrid warfare operations in France (disinformation, espionage)

financial.summary: French banks have largely exited Russia. Russian assets in France worth billions frozen under EU sanctions. French companies (Renault, TotalEnergies, Auchan) took massive write-downs on Russian operations. Some residual financial exposure remains through complex international structures.

energy.summary: Russian gas and oil supplies to France have been effectively terminated. France has diversified energy sources through Norwegian gas, LNG imports, and nuclear expansion. TotalEnergies retains a minority stake in Yamal LNG with ambiguous legal status under sanctions.

scientific.summary: Scientific cooperation largely suspended. Russian researchers excluded from EU-funded projects. Some individual researcher contacts continue informally. Joint programmes in nuclear and space science effectively frozen.
